data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

The linked use cases and prior steps do not include specific validations or results related to this cancellation scenario, leading to an inconclusive status. Without clear evidence of the scenario's behavior or outcomes, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is satisfied.
